task_text: Put together an agenda for next week's Q3 kickoff meeting. The meeting is 90 minutes and should cover the most important topics for the team to align on before Q3 starts. Save it as q3_kickoff_agenda.txt.

input.content:
Q3 Kickoff Meeting Agenda
Duration: 90 minutes
Purpose: Align the team on key priorities, goals, and plans before the start of Q3.

1. Welcome & Meeting Objectives (5 minutes)
   - Brief introductions if needed
   - Overview of agenda and meeting goals

2. Q2 Performance Recap (15 minutes)
   - Key achievements and metrics
   - Lessons learned and areas for improvement
   - Carryover items into Q3

3. Q3 Strategic Goals & OKRs (20 minutes)
   - Company/team-level objectives for Q3
   - Success metrics and targets
   - Alignment with broader annual goals

4. Key Initiatives & Project Roadmap (20 minutes)
   - Priority projects and deliverables
   - Timeline, milestones, and dependencies
   - Resource requirements and ownership

5. Team Roles, Responsibilities & Collaboration (15 minutes)
   - Role clarifications and any changes
   - Cross-functional collaboration needs
   - Communication and meeting cadences for Q3

6. Risks, Challenges & Mitigation Plans (10 minutes)
   - Potential blockers and risks
   - Contingency strategies
   - Support needed from leadership or other teams

7. Next Steps, Action Items & Q&A (5 minutes)
   - Immediate action items and owners
   - Follow-up schedule
   - Open discussion and questions

Notes: Please come prepared with any questions or input on Q3 priorities. Meeting materials will be shared in advance.

content.text:
I've put together a 90-minute Q3 kickoff agenda and saved it as `q3_kickoff_agenda.txt`. It covers:

1. Welcome & objectives  
2. Q2 recap  
3. Q3 goals & OKRs  
4. Key initiatives & roadmap  
5. Roles & collaboration  
6. Risks & mitigations  
7. Next steps & Q&A  

Time boxes are included so the meeting stays on track.
